title: lachnoloma lehmannii
intro: Lachnoloma lehmannii, also known as the Colombian angelica tree, is a plant species belonging to the family Rutaceae, native to the Andes mountains in Colombia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Lachnoloma lehmannii include its ability to relieve fever, reduce inflammation, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
